happy.message: I'll miss having someone who cares about the pixels. The animations, the spacing, the way things felt — you made our product beautiful and never let us forget it mattered!

sad.message: Our Friday design nitpick sessions were honestly one of my favourite parts of the week. Thank you for caring so much.

miserable.message: Bad day? Take a breath. Even the messiest CSS gets cleaned up eventually — and so will this. We're cheering you on.
